justification: All rubric criteria met: existing rates preserved (domestic 2.5, international 7.5 in RATES table), all 4 new ACs implemented correctly, weight validation applies globally (before destination lookup) with assumption noted, regression tests for existing rates explicitly present (AC5: 5 tests), all new ACs tested (21 total tests), no extra destinations added, acceptance_criteria_coverage maps AC1-AC5, deviations empty.

observations.text: Weight validation correctly applied globally before destination lookup, not scoped only to domestic
AC4 thoroughly tested with 4 cases including empty string and wrong-case variant
AC5 regression tests explicit with 5 dedicated tests for existing rates
Clean refactor to RATES lookup table without changing function signature
Global weight validation noted as an assumption in confidence section, showing awareness of spec ambiguity
No scope creep — no extra destinations beyond spec
